title.en: China-to-Nepal Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入尼泊尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入尼泊爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Nepal NBSM conformity requirements, NEA grid-connection and net-metering rules, AEPC quality standards for subsidised solar programmes, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and NS / IEC standards context — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与尼泊尔NBSM合格评定要求、NEA并网及净电量计量规则、AEPC补贴太阳能项目质量标准、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及NS / IEC标准背景——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與尼泊爾NBSM合格評定要求、NEA併網及淨電量計量規則、AEPC補貼太陽能項目品質標準、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及NS / IEC標準背景——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NBSM conformity scope determination, NEA grid-connection approval, AEPC equipment eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Nepal NBSM Technical Regulations, NEA grid-connection technical specifications, NS / IEC standards adoption status, AEPC quality requirements for subsidised programmes, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NBSM合格评定范围裁定、NEA并网批准、AEPC设备资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行尼泊尔NBSM技术法规、NEA并网技术规格、NS / IEC标准采纳状况、AEPC补贴项目质量要求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NBSM合格評定範圍裁定、NEA併網批准、AEPC設備資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行尼泊爾NBSM技術法規、NEA併網技術規格、NS / IEC標準採納狀況、AEPC補貼項目品質要求及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Nepal, the key practical gaps are: (1) NBSM NS certification — Nepal requires NS (Nepali Standard) conformity for regulated products, with NS standards adopting IEC; Chinese GB certifications are not automatically accepted; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence as required for NS / IEC-based conformity and NEA grid connection; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance for NEA grid-connection and net-metering approval; (4) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) firmware validation against NEA's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid parameters. For subsidised off-grid and rural electrification projects, AEPC quality standards are an additional gate. China GB/T 37408-2021 and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines do not satisfy Nepal's NS / IEC-referenced conformity and grid-connection requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口尼泊尔时，主要实际差距包括：（1）NBSM NS认证——尼泊尔对受监管产品要求NS（尼泊尔标准）合格评定，NS标准采纳IEC；中国GB认证不被自动接受；（2）NS / IEC合格评定及NEA并网连接要求的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）NEA并网及净电量计量审批所需的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（4）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）针对NEA 230/400 V、50 Hz电网参数的固件验证。对于补贴离网及农村电气化项目，AEPC质量标准是额外门槛。中国GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024基准不满足尼泊尔NS / IEC合格评定及并网要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口尼泊爾時，主要實際差距包括：（1）NBSM NS認證——尼泊爾對受監管產品要求NS（尼泊爾標準）合格評定，NS標準採納IEC；中國GB認證不被自動接受；（2）NS / IEC合格評定及NEA併網連接要求的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）NEA併網及淨電量計量審批所需的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（4）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）針對NEA 230/400 V、50 Hz電網參數的韌體驗證。對於補貼離網及農村電氣化項目，AEPC品質標準是額外門檻。中國GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024基準不滿足尼泊爾NS / IEC合格評定及併網要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
